title: Structural Rewrite Phase 3 Command Companion Source Surface Normalization Ready
subject: planning.structural_rewrite_program
summary: Records the approved first bounded Phase 3 slice by naming command companion source-surface normalization as the next rollback-safe command-authority normalization step.
notes: This transition reaffirms registry.py plus parser.py as the only accepted command-authority source. It approves one bounded companion-surface normalization slice only and does not start implementation.
